prose:
**Pyridine frontier‐orbital gap** — DFT single‐point (DFT//input‐xyz), tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four‐center integrals), PySCF via chemkit, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`, not re-optimized at DFT. SCF converged in 10 cycles; no warnings reported.
HOMO = −7.2525992 eV, LUMO = −1.112786 eV → gap = 6.1398131 eV

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --accept-defaults --charge 0 --mult 1 \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprilw3lg6/live.json --stdout none
```
Output files:
– JSON results: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprilw3lg6/live.json`
– Live log: `frontier_<timestamp>.out` (written to working directory, can be tailed for progress)
